example_label: Calculate log base of for pH or Richter scale calculetions

range_hints.base_log: Common: 10 (common log), e≈2.718 (natural), 2 (binary); cannot be 0 or 1

result_context: The resultat ({resultat}) is the exponent to which base_log must be raised to get nombre; log_natural uses base e (Euler's number).
formula_display: Logᵦ(nombre) = x where bˣ = nombre | ln(nombre) = logₑ(nombre)
mistakes: Trying to calculete log of zero or negative numbers (undefined)
Using base which is mathematically invalid for logarithms
Confusing log base with natural log (base e)
